# addr: # addr forms: 0xNNNNN = file offset | SEG:OFF = relative seg:off | DS:0xNNNN = DS-relative | IMG:0xNNNN = image offset

name: entry
comment: MZ entry point; sets DS/SS=0x0ce2 SP=0x7e78

name: init_early
comment: called from entry
column4: returns status in AX (far? near call e8)

name: startup_fail_or_main
comment: jmp target after early init

name: str_386_minimum
comment: 386 minimum ! -- DS:0x0000

name: vm_token_advance
comment: decode+skip one script token; biases op by 0xa0, uses length table DS:0x6f18

name: vm_token_special
comment: called for length-0 opcodes (A8 AC CC D3) from token_advance

name: vm_token_walker
comment: scan script for 0xA6 text token matching index bx

name: dlg_record_end_hold
comment: sets gs:0x0b35=gs:0x27cf*(gs:0x0aca/2)+6 and gs:0x67bb=1

name: vm_opcode_lengths
comment: per-opcode length/sentinel table DS:0x6f18, opcodes A0..D3 x2 bytes

name: render_string
comment: subtitle glyph blitter: SI=ascii str, DI=screen off, DL=color, ES=screen, stride 320; font tables gs:0x7802/0x78b2/0x7908

name: font_ascii_map
comment: ASCII->glyph index (xlatb base)

name: font_advances_ds
comment: per-glyph advance widths (DS offset)

name: font_glyphs_ds
comment: 8-byte glyph bitmaps (DS offset)

name: vm_mode
comment: current decode mode (0/1); set by FF/FE sentinels

name: vm_c2_presentation_flags
comment: C2 kind-0x0400 sets bit 1 after descript.des helper success

name: vm_flag_b2
comment: gates 0xFB sentinel handling in token_advance

name: vm_resource_offsets
comment: five u16 resource offsets populated at 0x53c8 from FS:0x11f4+profile*10; resolved at 0x55d9 into DS:0x671c..0x672f

name: vm_cod_ptr_exec
comment: COD far pointer used by main exec loop (lds si at 0x5601)

name: vm_cod_ptr_aux
comment: COD far pointer used by token walkers/helpers

name: vm_state_ptr
comment: far ptr to runtime object/line-record state table; serialized by save/load and read by VM record handlers

name: vm_dic_ptr
comment: DIC far pointer used by 0xA6 text assembly

name: vm_deb_object_table_ptr
comment: DEB/object table far pointer scanned in 20-byte records

name: vm_resource_profile_index
comment: current selected script/resource profile index; 0x53A0 avoids reload when AX matches

name: vm_pc
comment: script program counter (offset into COD)

name: vm_pc_saved
comment: saved/next PC used in branch handling

name: vm_branch_a
comment: VM control-flow state word

name: vm_branch_b
comment: VM control-flow state word

name: vm_word_buf
comment: word buffer filled by 0xA3 handler (collect word list)

name: vm_pending_word
comment: pending word appended by 0xA3 handler

name: vm_op_a3_collect
comment: opcode 0xA3 handler: copy 0-term word list from COD into gs:0x67f8

name: vm_control_flow
comment: VM branch/gosub control: updates PC gs:0x6772 via calls 0x577a/0x56a6/0x5afd

name: vm_resource_profile_select
comment: select script/resource profile AX; free old DS:0x6712 resources, copy five FS:0x11f4+AX*10 offsets into DS:0x6712, clear VM globals

name: vm_resource_offsets_populate
comment: copy selected five-resource profile from FS:0x11f4+AX*10 into DS:0x6712

name: vm_resource_offset_copy_loop
comment: copy and validate five selected resource offsets into DS:0x6712

name: vm_run_wrapper
comment: prepares script resource far pointers, calls BIOS RTC writers, then enters vm_exec_loop

name: vm_resource_ptr_resolve_loop
comment: resolves five DS:0x6712 resource offsets through 0x04b9:0190 into far pointers at DS:0x671c

name: vm_exec_loop
comment: main script interpreter loop; di=0x6eb0 handler table; dispatch at 0x5627

name: vm_dispatch
comment: call gs:[bx+0x6eb0], bx=(opcode-0xa0)*2 -> per-opcode near handler

name: vm_post_exec_record_update
comment: post-VM scan of DEB/object table via DS:0x672c and runtime state via DS:0x6724; updates display/control flags

name: vm_special_slot_remove
comment: remove AX from 16-word sentinel list DS:0x6d3e; CF set on hit

name: vm_special_slot_insert
comment: insert AX into 16-word sentinel list DS:0x6d3e; CF clear only when full

name: vm_special_slots
comment: 16-word runtime list for fields set to the blood/0xffff sentinel

name: vm_handler_table
comment: opcode handler jump table DS:0x6eb0, 52 near offsets into seg 0x04da, opcodes A0..D3

name: vm_op_ca_global_word_compare
comment: 0xCA global condition handler; compares token value to gs:0x0aa6

name: vm_op_cb_global_pair_compare
comment: 0xCB global pair condition handler; compares packed token value to gs:0x0aaa/0x0aa8

name: vm_op_a6_text
comment: 0xA6 TEXT handler: b1b2=line index into gs:0x6724; b3->gs:0x1fab; b4/b5=control(skip/loop/active 0x80)

name: vm_op_cd_record_triple
comment: 0xCD record-triple handler; consumes record/first/second words, optional A1 inverted compare

name: vm_bit_set_test_6aa7
comment: 0xB7 high-bit-first byte flag set/clear/test handler

name: vm_pair_record_6b06
comment: B8/B9/BD pair-record assignment/compare handler

name: vm_op_c1_record_state
comment: 0xC1 line-record state handler; raw token C1 record operand

name: vm_op_c2_record_state
comment: 0xC2 line-record state handler; raw token C2 record operand

name: vm_op_c3_record_link
comment: 0xC3 record-link handler; writes es:[record]={0xc3,related,1} on mode-0 success

name: vm_op_c4_actor
comment: 0xC4 actor/record handler; consumes record+related u16 operands and writes es:[record]={0xc4,related,0}

name: vm_op_c5_record_entry
comment: 0xC5 record-entry handler; writes es:[record]={0xc5,related,0} when related type is 0x0200

name: vm_op_c6_record_entry
comment: 0xC6 record-entry handler; writes es:[record]={0xc6,operand,0}

name: vm_op_c7_record_entry
comment: 0xC7 record-entry handler; writes es:[record]={0xc7,related,0} when related record is active

name: vm_op_c8_record_entry
comment: 0xC8 record-entry handler; consumes operand but writes es:[record]={0xc8,0,0} when record is empty

name: vm_op_c9_record_clear
comment: 0xC9 record-clear handler; zeros es:[record..record+4] and clears related 0xc4 actor subrecord

name: vm_text_selector
comment: signed per-line selector set from 0xA6 b3 (0xff/0x00=no voice; 1..N=talk clip)

name: vm_skip_count
comment: skip-N-tokens counter (IF/branch); set by 0xA6 b4&0x08

name: vm_loop_flag
comment: bit0=loop active bit1=loop range

name: vm_loop_target
comment: loop target address set by 0xA6 b4&0x10

name: vm_a6_b3_ptr
comment: saved pointer to 0xA6 b3 byte

name: vm_special_blood_object
comment: DEB object offset for built-in name blood; 0x6946 remaps RHS to 0xffff

name: vm_c2_presentation_gate
comment: C2 special-kind branch clears this byte before setting active line

name: vm_ctrl_signal
comment: handler->loop control signal (nonzero = special)

name: vm_active_line
comment: active dialogue-line id = sign_extend(0xA6 b3)+9; reset 0xffff on clear

name: dlg_line_activate
comment: reads signed gs:0x1fab(b3)+9 -> gs:0x6788 active line id

name: dlg_chatter_hold_consume
comment: tests and clears gs:0x67bb line-complete hold flag

name: dlg_clear_a
comment: clear dialogue/scene state: reset 0x1fab/0x6788/display gates; calls 0x71e:0x14b6

name: dlg_clear_b
comment: clear dialogue/scene state variant; resets voice/subtitle gates

name: dlg_stop_common
comment: common stop/clear routine called by dialogue clear paths

name: snd_scene_cleanup
comment: close+delete temp son.snd/mus.snd on scene change (int21 3E/41)

name: vm_state_save
comment: save-game path writes runtime state block DS:0x6724 after header/globals

name: vm_state_load
comment: load-game path reads runtime state block DS:0x6724 before rebuilding derived VM pointers/state

name: snd_clip_player
comment: SND clip player: AX=clip index; table DS:0x0bbf (off+len), bank DS:0x0bb3, +6 hdr; in-mem or lseek/read

name: snd_bank_loader
comment: SND bank loader/extractor at 0x0B1B:0x0855; AX=0 builds in-memory table, AX!=0 preserves table and can write son.snd

name: snd_clip_table
comment: per-clip table: u16 offset + u16 len, indexed by clip*4

name: snd_bank_base
comment: loaded SND bank base (far ptr) for in-memory clip play

name: snd_read_buf
comment: son.snd streamed-read destination buffer (far ptr)

name: h_son_snd
comment: DOS file handle for temp son.snd (voices/SFX)

name: h_mus_snd
comment: DOS file handle for temp mus.snd (music)

name: snd_path_tb
comment: static SND path string: sn\tb.snd

name: snd_path_template
comment: static SND path template: sn\xxxxxxxxxxxx

name: snd_path_radio
comment: static SND path string: sn\radio.snd

name: snd_path_3d
comment: static SND path string: sn\3D.snd

name: dlg_frame_update
comment: per-frame dialogue updater: active line gs:0x6788 vs displayed gs:0x678a; viewport letterbox for ids 5/0x27

name: dlg_reveal_complete_hold
comment: when reveal reaches NUL, sets gs:0x0b35=gs:0x0aca*4 and gs:0x67bb=1

name: vm_displayed_line
comment: currently-displayed dialogue-line id (vs active gs:0x6788)

name: render_yclip_lo
comment: render_string y-clip low bound (set 0x23 for letterbox)

name: render_yclip_hi
comment: render_string y-clip high bound (0xa5 letterbox / 0xc8 full)

name: vm_scale_index
comment: helper: scales AX (called with 2 and 0xf) for table indexing

name: vm_c2_descript_lookup
comment: C2 kind-0x0400 helper: opens descript.des and dispatches matching descriptor script

name: nav_actor_slot_update_loop
comment: walks six 0x18-byte navigation actor/object slots and dispatches via cs:0x06d4

name: nav_actor_subdispatch_call
comment: indirect call through cs:0x06d4 actor slot table

name: nav_actor_subdispatch_table
comment: six u16 near offsets: 07bc,06e0,095a,099e,0a1b,08a2

name: nav_actor_handler_1
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 1

name: nav_actor_handler_0
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 0

name: nav_actor_handler_5
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 5

name: nav_actor_handler_2
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 2

name: nav_actor_handler_3
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 3

name: nav_actor_handler_4
comment: temporary label: cs:0x06d4 table entry 4

name: nav_choice_dispatch
comment: rejects AL >= 5 before cs:0x0f29 table call

name: nav_choice_subdispatch_call
comment: indirect call through cs:0x0f29 navigation choice table

name: nav_choice_subdispatch_table
comment: five u16 near offsets: 0f33,0f4c,0fdd,1068,108c

name: nav_choice_handler_0
comment: temporary label: cs:0x0f29 table entry 0

name: nav_choice_handler_1
comment: temporary label: cs:0x0f29 table entry 1

name: nav_choice_handler_2
comment: temporary label: cs:0x0f29 table entry 2

name: nav_choice_handler_3
comment: temporary label: cs:0x0f29 table entry 3

name: nav_choice_handler_4
comment: temporary label: cs:0x0f29 table entry 4

name: snd_son_name
comment: son.snd voice/SFX bank filename

name: snd_mus_name
comment: mus.snd music bank filename

name: descript_des_name
comment: descript.des filename opened by C2 helper 0x7409

name: script_basenames
comment: table of scriptN.cod/.bas/.var/.dic/.deb names (16-byte stride)

name: font_ascii_map
comment: dialogue font ASCII map (DS:0x7802)

name: font_advances
comment: dialogue font glyph advance widths

name: font_glyphs
comment: dialogue font 8-byte glyph bitmaps
